events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. The reversed impulse-line taps (gas below, liquid on top) violate standard DP transmitter installation practice (API RP 551 / mfr manuals) — gas service needs top taps sloping down to a transmitter mounted below, liquid service needs bottom/side taps sloping continuously down to a transmitter below. As installed, this traps condensate in the gas lines and gas pockets in the liquid lines, corrupting the DP signal. Corrective rework specified before the loop can proceed to test/inspect.
